findings.summary: ID uniqueness is only enforced within isolated arrays (features, claims, references), failing to ensure globally unique IDs across all evidence types as required.
findings.suggested_fix: Merge featureIds, evidenceIds, and referenceIds into a single set and check for overlaps to enforce global ID uniqueness.

findings.summary: Lineage cycle detection only prevents direct self-reference (node referencing itself) but does not traverse the graph to detect multi-node cycles.
findings.suggested_fix: Implement a graph traversal (e.g., topological sort or DFS cycle detection) to detect cycles of any length in the lineage graph.

findings.summary: Tests for invalid fixtures are not table-driven, deviating from the 'Add table-driven cases for every invalid fixture' plan instruction.
findings.suggested_fix: Use vitest's it.each to table-drive the invalid fixture assertions instead of writing individual test blocks.
